product_highlights: Matrixyl™ 3000 — dual matrikine synbiotic peptide for collagen synthesis stimulation
Matrixyl™ synthe'6® — six key structural proteins stimulated via bio-inspired tripeptide

notes: Sederma, a subsidiary of Croda International, is one of the world's most prestigious cosmetic active ingredient companies and the creator of the iconic Matrixyl™ peptide technology — the most referenced peptide active in cosmetic science. Matrixyl™ 3000 and Matrixyl™ synthe'6® have generated hundreds of millions in product revenue globally through their collagen-stimulating matrikine mechanism, backed by extensive peer-reviewed clinical evidence. Sederma's biotech active portfolio spans peptides, growth factors, and plant meristematic cell actives, making them an absolutely essential SKIN-TWIN reference for prestige anti-aging formulation intelligence.
